_meta.source: CSO Ireland — Earnings Analysis 2022 + Eurostat SES 2022 Ireland
_meta.methodology: Ireland earnings data from Eurostat SES 2022, cross-referenced with CSO (Central Statistics Office Ireland) Earnings and Hours Worked publications. Covers gross annual earnings by ISCO-08 occupation. Dublin dominates the Irish tech market — most tech roles in Ireland are Dublin-based. Dublin is treated as equivalent to country-level for tech roles.
_meta.coverage: Ireland national (Dublin-equivalent for tech). Very strong signal for software engineering, product, and data roles due to concentration of multinational tech headquarters (Google, Meta, Apple, Microsoft, LinkedIn, Twitter/X EU HQs).
_meta.limitations: Ireland tech salaries are significantly inflated by multinational HQ presence — not representative of the broader Irish economy. ISCO-08 codes are broad. Data is 2022.
_meta.currency_note: All figures in EUR gross annual.

records._ref: Eurostat SES 2022, ISCO 2512 Software developers — Ireland, junior
records.notes: Ireland junior software developers. P25 earnings band. Boosted by multinational presence — entry-level at FAANG Dublin subsidiaries is above this range.

records._ref: Eurostat SES 2022, ISCO 2512 Software developers — Ireland, mid
records.notes: Ireland (Dublin is dominant market). Boosted by multinational tech presence. Dublin is effectively country-level for tech roles.

records._ref: Eurostat SES 2022, ISCO 2512 Software developers — Ireland, senior
records.notes: Senior software developers Ireland. Upper quartile. Heavy multinational presence means senior SWE in Dublin can command significantly above EU peers. Does not include equity.

records._ref: CSO Ireland + Levels.fyi 2024 — Software developers, Dublin city, mid
records.notes: Dublin city mid-level software developers. Consistent with Eurostat national figure — Dublin = ~Ireland for tech. Levels.fyi Dublin data cross-checked.

records._ref: Eurostat SES 2022, ISCO 1221 — Product Manager proxy, Ireland
records.notes: ISCO 1221 tech management — closest Eurostat mapping to product manager for Ireland. Multinational HQ presence inflates PM salaries significantly above EU peers.

records._ref: Eurostat SES 2022, ISCO 2529 — Data analyst, Ireland
records.notes: Data analyst / database professionals Ireland. Strong data market in Dublin (FAANG data teams). Maps to data-analyst, data-scientist.

records._ref: Eurostat SES 2022, ISCO 2431 — Marketing professionals, Ireland
records.notes: Marketing professionals Ireland. Many multinational EMEA marketing functions based in Dublin (Google, Meta, LinkedIn). Wide range due to mix of local and EMEA-scope roles.
